nasb.text: They reviled him and said, “You are His disciple, but we are disciples of Moses.

esv.text: And they reviled him, saying, “You are his disciple, but we are disciples of Moses.

cnv.text: 他們就罵他，說：“你才是他的門徒，我們是摩西的門徒。

ccb.text: 他们就骂他：“你才是祂的门徒！我们是摩西的门徒。

csbs.text: 他们就辱骂他，说：“你才是那个人的门徒！我们是摩西的门徒！
